content:
# AI Tools for Sales Automation in 2026

Sales teams need to reach more prospects while maintaining personal connections. AI tools help you automate and personalize your sales process!

Check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] for more AI tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]: Sales Email Automation

[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] helps sales teams write personalized emails at scale.

### Rytr for Sales
- **Cold email templates**: Proven formats that get responses
- **Follow-up sequences**: Automate your outreach
- **Personalization tokens**: Add human touch to automation

**Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## [[link:/tools/100|Notion AI]]: Sales Pipeline Management

[[link:/tools/100|Notion AI]] helps sales teams manage their pipeline and track leads.

### Notion AI for Sales
- **Pipeline tracking**: Monitor your deals
- **AI summaries**: Get quick insights from notes
- **Task automation**: Set up follow-up reminders

**Try Notion AI**: {{AFFILIATE_NOTION}}

---

## Step-by-Step Sales Automation

### 1. Research Prospects
Use ChatGPT to research companies and decision-makers.

### 2. Write Outreach
Use [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] to generate personalized emails.

### 3. Track Results
Use [[link:/tools/100|Notion AI]] to monitor your pipeline.

### 4. Follow Up
Automate follow-ups with AI-generated content.
